news.headline: Kremlin-friendly ex-president headed to victory in Bulgaria election
news.summary: After Viktor Orban’s defeat in Hungary, Bulgaria offers Russia its next best bet as it seeks to retain influence inside the European Union.

news.headline: Hamas Officials Say Group Is Ready to Hand Over Some Weapons
news.summary: Two senior Hamas officials in Gaza said the group was prepared to relinquish some automatic rifles and other arms, a concession that falls short of Israeli-U.S. demands.

news.headline: US forces attack and seize Iranian ship Touska near Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: US Central Command has published a video said to show a guided-missile destroyer firing at an Iranian-flagged ship.
